summary: TA Engine Best-Fit Boundary Selection testing completed successfully. All core endpoints working, pattern detection with line_scores implemented correctly, and Best-Fit algorithm selecting optimal boundary lines.
passed_tests: Pattern detection returns all required fields: type, confidence, touches, line_scores, points
line_scores field present showing Best-Fit quality metrics (upper/lower scores)
Upper and Lower boundary lines have correct 2-point structure
Multiple symbols (BTC, ETH, SOL) and timeframes (4H, 1D, 7D) work
Line scores consistent across requests (deterministic algorithm)
Pattern validation appropriately strict (55.6% detection rate)
Boundary line quality scores meaningful and correlate with pattern confidence
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (11/11 tests passed), Frontend: N/A (backend-only testing)
